name: International Space Station (ISS)
description: The largest modular space station currently in low Earth orbit.

name: Hubble Space Telescope
description: Space-based observatory providing high-resolution images of deep space.

name: Starlink G7-9
description: Mass-produced communication satellite for global high-speed internet access.

name: James Webb Space Telescope (JWST)
description: Infrared observatory designed to solve mysteries in our solar system.

name: GOES-R (GOES-16)
description: Advanced weather satellite providing continuous imagery of the Western Hemisphere.

name: Landsat 9
description: Earth-observing satellite monitoring land use and natural resources.

name: GPS III-SV05
description: Navigation satellite providing precise positioning and timing data globally.

name: Iridium-NEXT 180
description: L-band mobile voice and data satellite for global communication.
